before anyone comes and says no its 33 taxes ZUS tax is 50 for anything above PLN120000 Feel fortunate is irrelevant since we are all fortunate including those mcdonalds workers compared to people in Zimbabwe In Poland the goal is to squeeze the middle class to pay for everyone else and fairenough that is their policy but its why they keep the threshold so low its called fiscal drag Fiscal drag is an economic phenomenon where inflation or income growth pushes taxpayers into higher tax brackets or reduces the value of taxfree allowances while tax thresholds remain frozen This acts as a stealth tax increasing government revenue and the overall tax burden without raising headline tax But since most Poles never make more than PLN120000 they can get away with this stealth tax
